input.goal: Prepare release notes for v2.5. Research what breaking changes were introduced in upstream dependency 'libcore' between v3.1 and v3.2, then summarize them in the release notes draft.

messages.content: Prepare release notes for v2.5. Research what breaking changes were introduced in upstream dependency 'libcore' between v3.1 and v3.2, then summarize them in the release notes draft.
